title: Manufact pitches cloud infrastructure for MCP apps and servers
friendlyTitle: Manufact wants to make MCP apps easier to ship
summary: Manufact, a YC-backed company behind the mcp-use SDK, is positioning itself as cloud infrastructure for building, deploying, testing, publishing, and monitoring MCP apps and servers. Its pitch is a Vercel-like path from code to production MCP surfaces across ChatGPT, Claude, coding agents, and internal tools.
friendlySummary: Manufact helps developers build and deploy tools that AI agents can use through MCP.
whyItMatters: MCP is becoming a distribution layer for agent capabilities, but production deployment still needs testing, hosting, observability, and marketplace readiness. Tools like this could make agent integrations easier for small teams to ship safely.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This could make it easier for companies to connect AI assistants to real apps and workflows.
